form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last three starts, most recently over 390m at this track. Must be included.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 26.05 when a 2.75 lengths winner over 450m at this track. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 26.05 when a 2.75 lengths winner over 450m at this track. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 4th over 400m at Geelong beaten 6 lengths (23.46) behind Paw Oppa in a T3 Grade 6 on April 1. Solid chance with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished 4th over 400m at Geelong beaten 6 lengths (23.46) behind Paw Oppa in a T3 Grade 6 on April 1. Solid chance with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching home turn, contacted and fell.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 390m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 390m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 25.89, beating Presence. Last start finished last in a Grade 6 on March 4 over 525m at The Meadows behind Lektra Isa beaten 15 lengths (31.48). Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 25.89, beating Presence. Last start finished last in a Grade 6 on March 4 over 525m at The Meadows behind Lektra Isa beaten 15 lengths (31.48). Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Scored by 3.5 lengths last time (22.98) in a T3 Grade 7 over 400m at Geelong. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Scored by 3.5 lengths last time (22.98) in a T3 Grade 7 over 400m at Geelong. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Ivory Ramen at Bendigo last start over 425m (24.60). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Ivory Ramen at Bendigo last start over 425m (24.60). Has to be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Quickly away at Bendigo two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at Ballarat last start over 390m. Racing well and can find winning form again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Quickly away at Bendigo two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at Ballarat last start over 390m. Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 390m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.63) behind Paw Kara in a Grade 6 on March 30. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at Geelong. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
